untranslatable_reason: The signal specifies a custom '2-day RSI' variant (Michael Stokes) that replaces 1-day price changes with 2-day changes. This is not a standard RSI calculation and is not available in the allowed indicators list (rsi_7, rsi_14, rsi_21 are all standard RSI). The closest available indicator is rsi_7, but this does not match the custom 2-day calculation method described in the source material.
translation_notes: Signal requires a proprietary 2-day RSI variant not present in allowed indicators. Used rsi_7 as best approximation, but this is an imperfect substitution. The custom calculation method (Pi - Pi-2 for overlapping 2-day data) cannot be replicated with standard indicators. Exit condition inferred as RSI mean reversion back above 30 since author provided AUTHOR_SILENT for exits.
